questionHtml: Outline how a defibrillator is used to restore normal heartbeat.
markschemeHtml:
a. «paddles/electrodes/defibrillator» deliver an electric shock to the heart ✔

b. depolarizes cardiac muscle ✔

c. enables the pacemaker/SA node to regain control ✔

meta.title: Outline how a defibrillator is used to restore normal heartbeat.
